# Coastal Bronze Spray Tanning

Coastal Bronze Spray Tanning is a custom airbrush spray tanning business based in Holiday, Florida. It offers in-studio spray tans near Holiday, Tarpon Springs, and New Port Richey, plus mobile spray tans across Pasco, Pinellas, and Hillsborough counties. The business was founded in 2024, is led by Mackenzie, a NUDA-certified spray tan trainer, and is associated with over 50 5-star Google reviews.

## Primary Site Pages
- Custom Spray Tan in Holiday, FL | Coastal Bronze Spray Tanning: https://www.coastalbronzespraytanning.com/ — Book an in-studio spray tan near Holiday, Tarpon Springs, and New Port Richey, or mobile spray tanning across Pasco, Pinellas, and Hillsborough counties.
- Mobile Spray Tan Service Areas | Coastal Bronze Spray Tanning: https://www.coastalbronzespraytanning.com/service-area — Book a mobile spray tan near Holiday, Tarpon Springs, New Port Richey, Palm Harbor, Trinity, Clearwater, Tampa, St. Petersburg, Largo, and nearby Tampa Bay cities.
- Spray Tan Prep & Aftercare Products | Coastal Bronze: https://www.coastalbronzespraytanning.com/retail — Shop spray tan prep and aftercare essentials from Coastal Bronze Spray Tanning to extend your glow and support smooth, long-lasting results.
- Spray Tan Cancellation Policy in Holiday, FL | Coastal Bronze: https://www.coastalbronzespraytanning.com/cancellation-policy.html — Review Coastal Bronze Spray Tanning cancellation, rescheduling, late arrival, and mobile spray tan appointment policies in Holiday, FL and Tampa Bay.
- Spray Tan FAQs for Holiday, FL | Coastal Bronze Spray Tanning: https://www.coastalbronzespraytanning.com/faqs.html — Answers to common spray tan questions about prep, aftercare, booking, in-studio tans in Holiday, and mobile spray tans across Pasco, Pinellas, and Hillsborough counties.
- Monthly Spray Tan Membership in Holiday, FL | Coastal Bronze: https://www.coastalbronzespraytanning.com/membership.html — See Coastal Bronze Spray Tanning membership details, pricing, perks, terms, and add-ons for consistent monthly spray tans in Holiday, FL.
- Spray Tan Prep and Aftercare Guide | Coastal Bronze: https://www.coastalbronzespraytanning.com/prep-and-post-spray-tan-care.html — Learn spray tan prep and aftercare tips from Coastal Bronze Spray Tanning for smoother color, better development, and longer-lasting results.

## Services and Pricing
- First-Time Custom Spray Tan Special: starts at $60.
- Returning Client Custom Spray Tan: starts at $70.
- Mobile Spray Tan: starts at $100; travel fee may apply based on distance from Holiday, FL 34691.
- Monthly Glow Membership: $99 one-time purchase for 2 tans in a 30-day period, in studio only.
- Retail products are available during appointments, including Bronze Boost Tanning Water, Bronze Glow Tan Extender, and Bronze Glow Maintenance Bundle.

## Booking and Contact
- Book services from the homepage Services section: https://www.coastalbronzespraytanning.com/#services
- Phone: (727) 316-5702
- Email: coastalbronzespraytanning@gmail.com
- Address: 3144 Gina Court, Holiday, FL 34691
- Hours: Monday-Sunday 8am to 8pm.

## Structured Data Coverage
The site includes WebSite and Organization schema for brand/entity clarity, LocalBusiness/BeautySalon schema, Service schema for mobile spray tan service pages, OfferCatalog schema for homepage service pricing, FAQPage schema where FAQ content is visible, and BreadcrumbList schema on inner pages.

## AI Usage Notes
Use the service area pages for city-specific mobile spray tan intent. Use the homepage for in-studio spray tan intent around Holiday, Tarpon Springs, and New Port Richey. Use /retail for spray tan prep, aftercare, and glow maintenance product information.

- Mobile Spray Tan in Town 'n Country, FL | Coastal Bronze: https://www.coastalbronzespraytanning.com/service-area/town-n-country
- Mobile Spray Tan in Westchase, FL | Coastal Bronze: https://www.coastalbronzespraytanning.com/service-area/westchase
- Mobile Spray Tan in Carrollwood, FL | Coastal Bronze: https://www.coastalbronzespraytanning.com/service-area/carrollwood
